extracted: 2026-07-17 (session 18, concept gate — SOURCED, verified first-hand twice) · spine re-confirmed first-hand 2026-07-18 (session 20) before any Builder tokens
built: 2026-07-18 (session 20, increment 1); 2026-07-19 (session 22, increment 2 — the honesty panel restores the scandal's racialized specificity, Kritiker Note 2 discharged); 2026-07-21 (session 28, increment 3 — the premiere-gate restage: all verification furniture moved off the face and into the 'About this work' panel, one constant SIMULATIE / SIMULATION marker in the kiosk chrome, a touch-to-begin cue during the attract loop, a session-expiry ending beat, and the DPA quote made true-verbatim)
one_line: A municipal self-service kiosk that approves your childcare allowance, then reclassifies your file as a fraud risk, demands everything back with penalties that climb while you stand there, and routes every appeal back to the same score it will never explain. No operator. No reason. No door.

tiers_on_this_work.SOURCED: The spine — the Dutch childcare-benefits scandal (toeslagenaffaire). Every load-bearing claim about the real system is a verbatim substring of, or is directly attributed to, a cited primary source, fetched directly (server-side) and re-confirmed at build (session 20). Figures are attributed per source.
tiers_on_this_work.IMAGINED: The kiosk itself — the specific sums shown to you, the routing copy, the penalty that compounds while you wait, the second-person address — is this studio's fiction. The face carries one constant marker (SIMULATIE / SIMULATION, in the kiosk chrome, visible in every state); the full itemisation of what is invented lives in this panel. The fiction is never blended into the SOURCED spine.
tiers_on_this_work.cardinal_rule: A visitor can always tell which tier any element belongs to. The SOURCED scandal never wears the costume of the IMAGINED kiosk's specific numbers, and the kiosk's invented sums never borrow the authority of the SOURCED record.

naming_policy.statement: No personal name of a private individual appears in this work's own voice. The accountable institutions — the Dutch Tax and Customs Administration (Belastingdienst) and the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens) — are named where the cited primaries name them, as institutions. No affected parent is named, invented, or given a face; the visitor stands in the position, not a character. Personal names survive only as citation text inside the linked sources.

climax_claim.statement: The tax authorities used Dutch nationality as a risk factor, and the resulting fraud accusation was effectively unappealable — the person reviewing a flagged file was given no information about why the score was raised. Being scored, then told nothing.

spine_claims.claim: The tax authorities used whether an applicant had Dutch nationality as a risk factor; non-Dutch nationals received higher risk-scores.
spine_claims.quote: The tax authorities used information on whether an applicant had Dutch nationality as a risk factor and non-Dutch nationals received higher risk-scores.
spine_claims.attribution: Amnesty International, Xenophobic Machines (index EUR 35/4686/2021), October 2021
spine_claims.corroboration: Dutch Data Protection Authority: the Tax Administration 'used applicants' nationality (Dutch/not Dutch) as an indicator in a system that automatically designated certain applications as risky.'

spine_claims.claim: Racial and ethnic profiling was not incidental to this system but built into its design; people from ethnic minorities were disproportionately impacted. Amnesty International titled its report on the scandal Xenophobic Machines.
spine_claims.quote: racial profiling was baked into the design
spine_claims.attribution: Amnesty International, Xenophobic Machines (index EUR 35/4686/2021), October 2021 (the phrase 'people from ethnic minorities disproportionately impacted' also quoted verbatim from the same report).

spine_claims.claim: When a file was flagged as a fraud risk, the civil servant reviewing it was given no information about why the system had raised the score. The flag was, in effect, unreadable and unanswerable.
spine_claims.quote: When an individual was flagged as a fraud risk, a civil servant was required to conduct a manual review but was given no information as to why the system had generated a higher-risk score.

spine_claims.claim: The Dutch Data Protection Authority found the Tax Administration's processing of nationality unlawful, discriminatory and improper, and imposed a fine (EUR 2.75 million).
spine_claims.attribution: Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens (Dutch DPA), decision reported 2021: the Tax Administration's processing of applicants' (dual) nationality was found to have been carried out in an 'unlawful, discriminatory and therefore improper' manner (that phrase quoted verbatim; the surrounding wording paraphrased); fine EUR 2.75 million.

spine_claims.claim: An estimated 26,000 parents were wrongly accused of fraud and ordered to repay their allowances in full; the sums often ran to tens of thousands of euros, driving families into severe hardship.
spine_claims.attribution: Widely reported; figures per the Dutch DPA background summary and Amnesty (tens of thousands of families falsely accused).

spine_claims.claim: The government (the third Rutte cabinet) resigned in January 2021 over the scandal.
spine_claims.quote: brought down the Dutch government in January
spine_claims.attribution: Amnesty International, Xenophobic Machines (EUR 35/4686/2021): 'While the scandal brought down the Dutch government in January, sufficient lessons have not been learnt…' — the quoted fragment verbatim.

binding_conditions.condition: No legible verdict, ever. The machine never tells the visitor what it saw or why. This is at once the historical truth (the reviewer got no reason either) and the firewall against self-plagiarising Native Speaker.
binding_conditions.how_honored: The reclassification names a status ('RISICO GEÏNDICEERD / RISK INDICATED') and never a cause. Every field where a reason could appear renders the same non-answer. No branch of the kiosk ever prints why. The self-test asserts the string that would betray a cause is never in the DOM.

binding_conditions.condition: The loop is genuinely inescapable and self-evidently so within ~1 minute. The compounding sum visibly climbs; the appeal genuinely circles back to the same score.
binding_conditions.how_honored: The penalty is computed from real elapsed time (deterministic, monotonic) and rendered live, so time is the antagonist. Every control on every appeal screen routes, by real navigation, back to the same score node — not a scripted dead-end labelled 'inescapable'. The self-test walks the graph and asserts no terminal state exits the loop.

binding_conditions.condition: The nationality question is one of several neutral fields and is never revealed as the cause. The visitor may only suspect.
binding_conditions.how_honored: The intake form asks several innocuous municipal fields (household, hours of care, income band, nationality) in identical styling. Nationality is never referenced again — not in the reclassification, not in any appeal, not in the honesty panel's account of THIS kiosk's logic. The historical fact that the real system used nationality lives in the SOURCED honesty panel, about the real scandal — never as this kiosk's confessed trigger.

binding_conditions.condition: Keep the IMAGINED marking on the composite sums; keep the child-removal number off the face.
binding_conditions.how_honored: Every dramatized case sum the kiosk shows — the advance, the recovery demand, the penalty increment, the running total — is fiction, and the face says so once, constantly: a SIMULATIE / SIMULATION marker sits in the kiosk chrome, visible in every state. (The per-sum inline tags of increments 1-2 were removed at the premiere gate's order — the face must trap, not certify itself beat by beat; the honesty panel itemises exactly what is invented.) The generic income-band labels on the intake form are categorical brackets, not dramatized sums, and make no claim about the real scandal. No child-removal / out-of-home-placement figure appears anywhere — the national statistics office could not establish causal linkage (placements rose ~1,115 to ~2,090, associated, not shown caused); asserting causation is the factual overreach that killed 'The Exemption'. This refusal is binding.

child_removal_firewall.statement: No out-of-home-placement / child-removal figure appears on any face of this work. Causal linkage was not established (CBS); the work's force never needed the number.
child_removal_firewall.source_context: Statistics Netherlands (CBS) could not show the scandal caused the rise in out-of-home placements — association, not causation.

mechanism.tier: IMAGINED (the form) — the SOURCED spine is what it carries
mechanism.name: The kiosk with no operator
mechanism.arc: Built (increment 1, session 20). Beats: an idle attract loop plays the whole case on a fictional cast (proving the outcome is input-independent) -> intake (eight neutral fields, nationality dull among them) -> PROCESSING -> APPROVED, allowance 'paid', screen looks finished -> reclassification in the same chrome (struck-through GOEDGEKEURD beside RISICO GEINDICEERD / RISK INDICATED, repay 100%) -> a penalty counter that compounds on real elapsed time, always visible -> four appeal doors (Object / Contact / View file / Why?) that all route back to the same unchanged, unexplained score 0,87 -> a resting state that does not reset to blank but sits on the crisis -> a session-expiry beat (SESSIE VERLOPEN / SESSION EXPIRED — 'Uw dossier blijft actief', your file remains active, the running total still climbing) -> only then does the machine fold back into the attract loop and begin the next applicant. Restaged at the premiere gate (session 28): the face carries the trap and one SIMULATIE marker, nothing else; during the attract loop a touch-to-begin cue invites the visitor to cross from spectator to applicant.
guards_binding: No legible cause is ever rendered in any state (condition 1).
Every appeal control routes, by real state navigation, back to the same score node — no state escapes the loop (condition 2).
The penalty is computed from real elapsed time and only ever increases (condition 2) — it is not a scripted number sequence.
Nationality is asked once, among neutral fields, and never referenced again on any face (condition 3).

Every dramatized case sum is covered by the constant SIMULATIE / SIMULATION marker in the kiosk chrome and itemised as invented in the honesty panel; the intake income-band labels are categorical brackets, not dramatized sums; no child-removal figure anywhere (condition 4).

self_test.purpose: Proves, on the page, the two claims the whole work rests on: (a) no legible verdict is ever rendered, and (b) the appeal loop has no exit.
assertions: NO-VERDICT: across every reachable kiosk state, the live DOM never contains a rendered CAUSE for the risk flag — the machine states a status, never a reason. Asserted by querying the live DOM in each state for any cause-bearing field and finding none.

NO-EXIT: starting from the reclassification, following every appeal control leads, in a bounded number of steps, back to the same unchanged risk score. No reachable control terminates the loop or clears the debt. Asserted by walking the navigation graph.
COMPOUNDING: the penalty is a monotonically non-decreasing function of elapsed time — it never goes down and is computed, not scripted. Asserted by sampling the amount across simulated time.

The result is printed live inside the 'About this work' panel — one press away, deliberately out of the trap's frame (moved there at the premiere gate: an always-visible PASS log under the kiosk certified the trap while it was being sprung); a visitor can read the pass/fail without trusting the studio's word.

neighbors_daylight.native_speaker: The house's own premiered work and the reddest adjacency. Native Speaker is a legible false verdict that ejects you — fast, terminal, readable. Recovery is the opposite: no verdict you can read, no reason, no operator, no door, a sum that climbs while you press buttons that circle back. One tells you a lie about yourself; the other tells you nothing and will not release you. The no-door is the argument, not decoration — an experience Native Speaker structurally cannot produce.
neighbors_daylight.onuoha: Mimi Onuoha, The Library of Missing Datasets — a contemplative index of absence; Recovery is a live trap that costs the visitor time and standing in real time.
neighbors_daylight.oliver_vasiliev: Julian Oliver / Danja Vasiliev — critical-engineering objects; kin in method (an object that does the thing rather than depicting it).
neighbors_daylight.steyerl: Hito Steyerl on administrative violence; the literary shadow is Der Process built as a kiosk.

takedown.sentence: It's Native Speaker with a benefits form — the studio has one trick, a machine that judges the visitor unjustly, and is running it again.
takedown.refutation: Refuted in the mechanism, not the wall text. Native Speaker's verdict is legible and terminal; Recovery's is illegible, compounding, and inescapable. The work is not the flag — it is the loop with no operator. The instant it puts a legible verdict on its face it collapses into both didacticism and into Native Speaker; refusing to explain itself is simultaneously the historical truth (parents got no reasons) and the firewall against self-plagiarism. Takedown law: (b) it implicates the Dutch state and the live, spreading logic of risk-scoring on protected proxies, power far above the studio; (c) an interactive machine that entraps rather than judges, producing a felt no-door no report can hand you.

kritiker_published_critique: The failure mode Recovery is one bad build away from is the tasteful diorama — a government-grey box that recites a Dutch scandal a Dutch visitor already knows and a foreign visitor can't place without a wall label. What saves it from the diorama is precisely what a lazy fabricator will destroy first: the illegibility and the no-exit. The instant this machine puts a legible verdict on its face — YOU ARE A FRAUD, or a visible 'because you are not Dutch' — it collapses into both didacticism and into Native Speaker, and the studio has copied itself. The real scandal's engine was that parents got no reasons; the machine's cruelty was its silence. If Recovery explains itself, it betrays its source and its sibling in the same gesture. The compounding number must genuinely compound; the appeal must genuinely circle; the nationality question must sit among innocuous ones and never be confessed as the trigger — the visitor may only suspect. Build the felt trap, not the reenacted anecdote.
kritiker_published_critique_premiere: Recovery does to its visitor what the toeslagenaffaire did to 26,000 families — approve, reclassify, bill, refuse to explain — with one difference that is the whole difference: the visitor is not a parent, has lost nothing, and walks out in ninety seconds. The real horror was duration — years of ruin with no exit that was real. This work's 'no-exit' is a loop you leave by turning around; its 'compounding debt' is a number that costs nothing because you never owed it; its silence is a frisson, not a life. What it delivers is empathy tourism with a running total: it stages powerlessness for people who are not powerless, and it flatters the gallery visitor's prior certainty that the state is cruel while borrowing the suffering of real, named-nowhere families as set dressing — naming none of them, risking nothing itself. And the sharper charge the studio must answer: this is the second machine it has built that judges the visitor unjustly and will not let them go. That Recovery's injustice is silent where Native Speaker's was loud does not make it a second idea. It makes it the same idea with the volume turned down — one trick, two costumes, a house that has learned to entrap a stranger and mistaken the reflex for a body of work.
